title.en: PrismML Releases Bonsai 27B: 1-bit and Ternary Builds of Qwen3.6-27B That Run on Laptops and Phones
title.zh: PrismML 发布 Bonsai 27B：在笔记本电脑和手机上运行的 Qwen3.6-27B 的 1 位和三元版本

summary.en: PrismML just released Bonsai 27B. It is a low-bit representation of Qwen3.6-27B, not a new pretrain. The architecture is unchanged. Two variants ship under Apache 2.0. Ternary Bon…
summary.zh: PrismML 刚刚发布了 Bonsai 27B。它是 Qwen3.6-27B 的低位表示，而不是新的预训练。架构没有改变。 Apache 2.0 下有两个变体。三元邦…

title.en: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
title.zh: 据报道，OpenAI 的第一款硬件设备是一款可移动的无屏扬声器

summary.en: OpenAI's first hardware device is reported to be a screenless, AI-guided smart speaker that can move. Weird enough for you?
summary.zh: 据报道，OpenAI 的第一款硬件设备是一款无屏幕、AI 引导、可移动的智能音箱。对你来说够奇怪的吗？

title.en: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
title.zh: OpenAI 今年可能会推出 ChatGPT 智能音箱

summary.en: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a…
summary.zh: 据彭博社报道，OpenAI 的第一款设备将是一款智能扬声器，可以让你与 ChatGPT 交谈。该设备显然不会有屏幕，但会使用……

title.en: Mistral Vibe for Code vs Claude Code vs Cursor vs Codex: Four Agents Scored on One Scaffold-to-PR Task

title.en: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
title.zh: 代理时代如何管理人工智能投资

summary.en: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
summary.zh: 了解企业如何通过衡量每美元的有用工作、提高效率和扩展高价值工作流程来管理代理时代的人工智能投资。

title.en: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
title.zh: 现在，防御者也开始接受即时注入

summary.en: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
summary.zh: “上下文轰炸”会诱骗黑客代理在造成伤害之前将其关闭。

title.en: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
title.zh: 通过 ATL Saathi 为印度下一代创新者提供支持

summary.en: Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.
summary.zh: Google 和 AIM 推出了 ATL Saathi，这是一款由 Gemini 驱动的人工智能工具，为印度机器人实验室的教育工作者提供支持。

title.en: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
title.zh: Google 25 年来首次重新设计了搜索框——这就是为什么它比你想象的更重要。

summary.en: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a lis…
summary.zh: 四分之一个世纪以来，谷歌搜索框一直是计算领域最知名的界面之一：一个细长的白色矩形、一个闪烁的光标、几个键入的单词和一个列表……
